title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: `google-slides-generator.js` and `slides-template-renderers.js` show the intended hardening, but there are still gaps in robustness and coverage. 1. 回帰リスク（高） - `validateContentDensity()` still truncates everything in `gemini-only` mode instead of performing smarter reflow/splitting, so information density drops abruptly for title/lead/body before rendering. This is still character-count only, not layout-driven overflow control. [google-slides-generator.js#L122-L136](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L122), [google-slides-generator.js#L687-L840](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L687) - `fitTitleFontSize()` is length-threshold based, not width-aware. Mixed CJK + long tokens can still overflow or over-shrink unpredictably because pixel width is not measured. [slides-template-renderers.js#L139-L148](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L139), [slides-template-renderers.js#L556-L568](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L556), [slides-template-renderers.js#L169-L174](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L169) - `section` template has `maxTitleChars` override in `gemini-only`, but renderer-side title fitting is still static, unlike `cover`/`generic`, so clamp and visual adaptation are inconsistent by template type. [google-slides-generator.js#L122-L136](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L122), [google-slides-generator.js#L707-L710](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L707), [slides-template-renderers.js#L245-L256](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L245) - Density clamps for lead/notes/rows and renderer-local truncation can double-sanitize and conflict silently (e.g., lead/notes hard caps in generator + renderer-local lead truncation, plus `textW` changes) making outputs less deterministic across paths. [google-slides-generator.js#L699-L703](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L699), [google-slides-generator.js#L833-L837](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L833), [slides-template-renderers.js#L584-L588](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L584), [slides-template-renderers.js#L556-L568](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L556) 2. テストの欠落（高） - `gemini-only` density test coverage is minimal and only covers `generic` + `risktable`, not all template-specific overrides (`cover/section/comparison/timeline`), so adaptive clamp policy is under-tested. [test-unit-google-slides-density.js#L23-L54](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-google-slides-density.js#L23) - `fitTitleFontSize` behavior is not directly unit-tested (for thresholds, minimum font floors, or boundary lengths). [slides-template-renderers.js#L139-L148](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L139), [slides-template-renderers.js#L556-L559](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L556) - `renderSlide` tests only assert non-empty requests; they do not validate title truncation/fitting outputs (`_title` text/font size) or title-wrap behavior. [test-e2e.js#L292-L340](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-e2e.js#L292) - Post-QC has a title-wrap case but no direct linkage asserting new pre-fit logic keeps content under that boundary. [test-unit-qc-post-generation.js#L358-L411](file:///Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-post-generation.js#L358) 3. 実行確認 - `node test-unit-google-slides-density.js` currently passes (`2 passed, 0 failed`) with current tests, but coverage is narrow. [test-unit-google-slides-density.js#L56](file:///Users/...
